calendar.matters:
Petition For Writ Of Mandate; Per Order 6/22/16.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Zacks, Esq. and James Kraus, Esq. (415-956-8100) for Plaintiff/Petitioner/Moving party San Francisco Apartment Association.
Wayne Snodgrass, Deputy City Attorney (415-554-4675) for Defendant/Respondent/opposing party City and County of San Francisco.
Court reporter: Sandy Carranza, CSR #7062, 415-893-1861, Reported, (501).

The Court commends parties on their pleadings and instructs them to make their record. Hearing is held. Petitioner and Respondent Argued. Parties argue the San Francisco Rent Ordinance. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petition for Writ of Mandate is taken under submission. Both sides to submit proposed orders by email to the staff attorney. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Sandy Carranza, CSR #7062, 415-893-1861, Reported, (501).
